Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Advanced From Oct-06-20 To Sep-30-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Complaint Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 425.16
Off Calendar Sep-30-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs ROGER YUEN, FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE's Special Motion To Strike Complaint Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 425.16 is Off calendar. Request for dismissal of complaint filed 9/25/20 as to moving defendants Roger D. Yuen and Farmers Insurance Exchange. The court is not deciding at this time whether Defendants may recover their attorney's fees and costs incurred in bringing the special motion to strike. (See Law Offices of Andrew L. Ellis v. Yang (2009) 178 Cal.App.4th 869, 879 [where plaintiff dismisses its case while a motion to strike is pending, the trial court continues to have jurisdiction over the case for the limited purpose of ruling on the defendants' motion to attorney fees and costs]; Pfeiffer Venice Properties v. Bernard (2002) 101 Cal.App.4th 211, 215 [trial court has jurisdiction to award attorney fees to a prevailing defendant whose SLAPP motion was not heard solely because the matter was dismissed before defendants obtained a ruling on the SLAPP motion]; Moore v. Liu (1999) 69 Cal.App.4th 745, 751 ["a defendant who is voluntarily dismissed, with or without prejudice, after filing a section 425.16 motion to strike, is nevertheless entitled to have the merits of such motion heard as a predicate to a determination of the defendant's motion for attorney's fees and costs under subdivision (c) of that section"]. If defendants file a motion for attorney's fees and costs under Code of Civil Procedure section 425.16(c)(1), the court will determine that issue in connection with its resolution of that motion.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
